file_insights.key_content: Comprehensive DRF serializers for subscription models (Feature, Plan, Subscription, Invoice, PlanFeature, OrganizationUsage)
patterns_used: Multi-tier serializers (Minimal, List, Detail, Create, Update)
notable_features: Proper separation of concerns with minimal, list, detail, create, update serializers
Extensive docstrings with API response format examples
Custom validation for unique fields (code, slug)

file_insights.key_content: ViewSets for subscription module with create, retrieve, update, destroy, list operations
URL routing configuration for subscription endpoints

patterns_discovered.description: Consistent use of Minimal -> List -> Detail -> Create/Update serializer progression for complex models
patterns_discovered.benefit: Reduces payload size, improves API performance, maintains consistent interface

patterns_discovered.description: Clear distinction between platform-level (SoftDeleteModelSerializer) and tenant-scoped (TenantModelSerializer) models
patterns_discovered.benefit: Automatic organization context injection, prevents data leakage, enforces isolation

patterns_discovered.description: Use of SerializerMethodField for derived values (formatted_price, yearly_discount_percentage, subscription_count)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Encapsulates business logic in serializers, reduces API consumer complexity

patterns_discovered.description: PlanFeatureInlineSerializer used within PlanDetailSerializer for related data
patterns_discovered.benefit: Provides rich nested data without multiple API calls

patterns_discovered.description: validate_code and validate_slug methods check uniqueness with soft-delete awareness
patterns_discovered.benefit: Prevents duplicate platform-level resources, respects soft-delete semantics

gotchas_discovered.description: Platform-level models use soft deletes (deleted_at). All queries must filter deleted_at__isnull=True to avoid returning deleted records
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Always include deleted_at filter in model queries; consider queryset method on model

gotchas_discovered.description: TenantModelSerializer requires organization context to be injected from request. Missing context will cause errors
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Ensure ViewSet properly passes request context; override get_serializer_context if needed

gotchas_discovered.description: Plan ID is write_only (plan_id for input) while plan is read_only (nested object in response). Must not expose plan_id in output
gotchas_discovered.evidence: plan_id: write_only=True, plan: read_only=True in SubscriptionDetailSerializer
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Clearly document write_only and read_only fields in API docs

gotchas_discovered.description: Update serializers must exclude current instance when checking uniqueness to allow unchanged values
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Always exclude instance in update validation; consider using DRF UniqueValidator

gotchas_discovered.description: get_subscription_count() performs database query for each serialized object. Could cause N+1 problem at list view
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Optimize ViewSet with select_related or annotate for list views; possibly remove from list serializer

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Computed Fields on Both List and Detail
gotchas_discovered.description: Fields like formatted_price calculated on every serialization. Should only be in detail/create responses
gotchas_discovered.evidence: formatted_price in both SubscriptionListSerializer and SubscriptionDetailSerializer
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider removing from list serializer or lazy-loading only when needed

approach_outcome.description: Create subscriptions module API: serializers, viewsets, URLs for plans and subscriptions
approach_outcome.implementation_strategy: Comprehensive serializer-first approach with multi-tier hierarchy, multi-tenancy support, and soft-delete awareness
key_achievements: Implemented complete serializer suite (Minimal, List, Detail, Create, Update) for all subscription models
Enforced multi-tenancy through TenantModelSerializer base class with automatic organization injection
Added platform-level soft-delete support for Feature, Plan, PlanFeature models
Included nested inline serializers for rich API responses
Added custom validation for unique constraints with soft-delete awareness
Provided comprehensive docstrings and API response format examples
Implemented computed fields for business logic (pricing, discounts, status checks)

recommendations.recommendation: Add prefetch_related/select_related in ViewSet list views
recommendations.rationale: Computed field get_subscription_count() will cause N+1 queries without optimization
recommendations.implementation: Use Prefetch object to optimize related subscriptions query; consider annotate for counts

recommendations.recommendation: Create base queryset method for soft-delete filtering
recommendations.rationale: Repeated deleted_at__isnull=True filtering is error-prone and violates DRY
recommendations.implementation: Add get_active() or get_not_deleted() method to model managers

recommendations.recommendation: Replace custom validate_* methods with DRF UniqueValidator
recommendations.rationale: More consistent with DRF patterns, built-in queryset support for soft-delete filtering

recommendations.recommendation: Remove subscription_count from list serializer, keep only in detail
recommendations.rationale: Unnecessary database queries on list views where counts likely not needed
recommendations.implementation: Create separate PlanListSerializer without subscription_count field

recommendations.recommendation: Add test cases for multi-tenant isolation
recommendations.rationale: Verify that organization_id injection works correctly and prevents cross-org data access
recommendations.implementation: Create test with multiple organizations; assert subscriptions properly scoped

recommendations.recommendation: Add examples in docstrings for nested response structures
recommendations.rationale: API consumers need to understand complex nested serializer outputs
recommendations.implementation: Add JSON example responses to serializer docstrings
